name: Amon.uasSouth30
title: Eastward Near-Surface Wind
description: Eastward component of the near-surface (usually, 10 meters)  wind
processing note:
normally, the the wind component should be reported at the 10 meter height
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Amon.uasSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
